message:
feat(cli): Migrate all commands from robot_mode to output_format

Batch migration of 40+ command files from ctx.robot_mode boolean to
ctx.output_format enum pattern:

- build.rs (52 usages), prune.rs, bundle.rs, import.rs, personalize.rs,
  init.rs, graph.rs, experiment.rs, and all other command files
- Changed -o to -O for global --output-format to avoid conflict with
  build command's --output flag
- Updated snapshot tests for new search output format

Replacements follow consistent pattern:
- !ctx.robot_mode → ctx.output_format == OutputFormat::Human
- ctx.robot_mode → ctx.output_format != OutputFormat::Human

This preserves backward compatibility while enabling the new 5-format
output system (Human, Json, Jsonl, Plain, Tsv).

Part of output format selection feature (meta_skill-hu66).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
